stemHtml:
You receive a NOTAM stating that GNSS may be unavailable from 19/02 to 28/02, daily between 2000 and 2359 around the location (N32°21' E017°33'). The following are the areas affected at different flight levels.

Radius 40 NM at FL400 and above
Radius 25 NM at FL200
Radius 20 NM at FL150
Radius 10 NM at FL100

Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: GNSS will be unavailable until 19/02 at all flight levels
options.b: GNSS will be unavailable until 28/02 at all flight levels
options.c: GNSS will sometimes be unavailable between 19/02 and 28/02
options.d: GNSS will be out of order on 23/02
